---
title: "STEM Exam Media Export"
lang: vi
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
  docx:
    reference-doc: null
---

::: {.callout-note}
Status: `PREVIEW_ASSESSMENT`, `PREVIEW_ONLY`, `NON_CANONICAL`.
:::

## Media Prompt

Replace this prompt with the assessment question stem.

![Replace with concise alt text](media_ohstem_qxx_001.svg){fig-alt="Replace with concise alt text"}

## Export Commands

```powershell
quarto render exam_export.qmd --to html
quarto render exam_export.qmd --to docx
```
